title: garcinia goudotiana
intro: Garcinia goudotiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the mangosteen family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indonesian medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and rheumatism. The health benefits of Garcinia goudotiana include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Garcinia goudotiana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts have been used in various forms of traditional medicine.
